verbatim_quote: So this is an unfamiliar environment the system has not been trained on and you know, it doesn't know a priority like the, there's no calibration of the camera or, or whatever. And it's pretty robust to the particular anatomy of the robot and the, and, and the position of the camera.
gloss: [ANALOGY] So this is an unfamiliar environment the system has not been trained on and you know, it doesn't know a priority like the, there's no calibration of the camera or, or whatever. ...
